lesson.menu_desc: Putting Block 1 together in one real call -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- Review -- A Customer Check-in Call
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Patrícia Xavier Lima Iwashita | Aula 5 -- Review -- A Customer Check-in Call

listenings.text: Hi Patrícia, this is Mark from Acme. I am calling before our check-in tomorrow. Things are going well on our side. We have finished the onboarding, and the team is using the new dashboard every day. I have one quick question for the call: could you tell me when the next release is ready? We are also still waiting on one report, but it is not urgent. Thanks, and talk to you tomorrow.

Hi Patrícia, it is Sofia. Just a quick note before your check-in call with Acme. I have reviewed their account, and everything looks healthy. They have used the product a lot this month, and adoption is growing. At the moment, our team is preparing the new training sessions for them. One thing to confirm on the call: do you know if they need extra licenses? Let us recap after the call. Good luck.
